title: Armor Insight
description: Visualizes hidden armor mechanics — real protection %, enchantment effectiveness, toughness, durability, damage preview, and armor comparison.
body:
# Armor Insight

  **The Armor Insight mod.** See what your armor actually does — protection percentage, enchantment effectiveness,
  toughness, damage reduction, and more — directly on your HUD.

  Minecraft's armor system has five hidden layers that players never see: armor points, armor toughness, enchantment
  protection factors (EPFs), damage type specificity, and durability across pieces. Armor Insight makes all of it
  visible at a glance, without replacing any vanilla HUD elements.

  ## Features

  - **Protection Percentage** — Shows your real effective damage reduction as a color-coded percentage next to the armor
   bar, calculated using Minecraft's actual armor formula including toughness and enchantments
  - **Enchantment Shimmer Overlay** — Golden glow on each vanilla armor bar icon that intensifies with enchantment
  protection level — instantly see "enchanted" vs "unenchanted" at a glance
  - **Combined Durability Bar** — Thin bar below the armor bar showing average durability across all pieces, with a
  flashing warning when any piece is critically low
  - **Toughness Indicator** — Small diamond icon to the left of the armor bar showing your hidden armor toughness value
  (diamond/netherite only)
  - **Damage Type Breakdown** — Hover over any armor piece to see protection against each damage type: Melee,
  Projectile, Fire, Blast, and Fall
  - **Incoming Damage Preview** — Look at a hostile mob to see how much damage they'd deal through your current armor
  - **Armor Comparison** — Hover over an unequipped armor piece to see how swapping it would change your total
  protection, toughness, and durability

  ## Controls

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | V | Toggle all overlays on/off |

  ## Configuration

  All features are individually toggleable via `config/armorinsight.json`. Customize overlay colors, positions, display
  styles, critical thresholds, and more.

  ## Compatibility

  - **Client-side only** — works on vanilla servers, Realms, and multiplayer
  - Compatible with AppleSkin, Sodium, Iris, Jade, and armor HUD mods
  - Minecraft 1.21.11 with Fabric

  ## Installation

  1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) for Minecraft 1.21.11
  2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
  3. Drop the JAR into your `mods/` folder
